description: You are a wind turbine blade designer creating a small horizontal-axis wind turbine (HAWT) blade with a 5-meter radius. Using the airfoil coordinate files naca0015.dat (root) and naca4412.dat (tip) located in /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/, design a blade in QBlade with at least 6 radial stations spanning from approximately 0.5m to 5.0m. Assign NACA 0015 to the inboard stations and NACA 4412 to the outboard stations, with a chord distribution tapering from approximately 0.5m at the root to 0.15m at the tip. Save the complete project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/my_hawt_blade.wpa. You are logged in as user 'ga'.
